# Downloads

RouterOS


SwitchOS


CHR


WinBox


Mobile


Tools


Changelogs


RSS


### Mobile

![MikroTik Pro app logo](https://mikrotik.com/images/logo/app-pro.png)

#### MikroTik Pro

Use the MikroTik smartphone app to configure your router when a computer is not available. Full configuration menus are available to access all parts of RouterOS.


[Android (Google Play Store)](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.mikrotik.android.tikapp "Go to Google Play Store") [Android (F-Droid Store)](https://fdroid.link/#https://cdn.mikrotik.com/fdroid/repo?fingerprint=78C22C6CB2A014F57373A10D15FB5AA68D64A94C8DF0E4F56C3C04914D73B9B1 "Go to F-Droid Store") [iOS (App Store)](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/mikrotik/id1323064830 "Go to App Store")

![MikroTik Home app logo](https://mikrotik.com/images/logo/app-home.png)

#### MikroTik Home

Use the MikroTik Home app to apply the most basic initial settings for your MikroTik home access point and manage your home devices.


[Android (Google Play Store)](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.mikrotik.android.mikrotikhome "Go to Google Play Store")

![MikroTik VPN - Back To Home app logo](https://mikrotik.com/images/logo/app-back-to-home.png)

#### MikroTik VPN - Back To Home

Free secure VPN access anywhere – unleash the power of your router! Even if your router doesn't have a public IP or is behind a NAT or a Firewall! More than a VPN: Quick & easy filesharing, avoiding content region locks, or adding a safety layer for truly anonymous browsing.


[Android (Google Play Store)](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.mikrotik.android.freevpn "Go to Google Play Store") [iOS (App Store)](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/mikrotik-back-to-home/id6450679198 "Go to App Store")

![MikroTik Beacon Manager app logo](https://mikrotik.com/images/logo/app-beacon.png)

#### MikroTik Beacon Manager

MikroTik Beacon Manager application is designed for Bluetooth tag (TG-BT5-XX) configuration.


[Android (Google Play Store)](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.mikrotik.android.bt5 "Go to Google Play Store") [iOS (App Store)](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/mikrotik-beacon-manager/id1561796698 "Go to App Store")

metadata.og:description: MikroTik makes networking hardware and software, which is used in nearly all countries of the world. Our mission is to make existing Internet technologies faster, more powerful and affordable to wider range of users.
metadata.description: Download latest version of MikroTik RouterOS and other MikroTik software products.
